subject: [PATCH 10/14] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch author posted a follow-up reply addressing some implementation details, specifically regarding the silent-skip on PM_SCAN_WP_MATCHING + RWP VMA and the addition of similar operation for RWP.

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the pagemap API to add a new category for RWP (Read-Write Protection) tracking, separating it from write protection. The change involves updating documentation and code to reflect this distinction.
